notes: CLAHE is a TRAIN-TIME augmentation only; do NOT apply it at inference.
Enroll = mean of L2-normalized embeddings from a few frames, then re-normalize.

int8_viable=false means INT8 quantization was tested and rejected for this model/backbone combination (MobileNetV3 SE-blocks are quantization-fragile). The 'models' block already routes to fp16/fp32 fallbacks — do not manually point auth traffic at palm_int8_mobile.onnx or palm_int8_web.onnx even though the files exist on disk; they are kept only for diagnostic reference.
Re-enrollment note: any templates built while int8 models were mistakenly in use should be regenerated against the fp16/fp32 path now marked authoritative.
